programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Josh Porter go up against Blake Broadhurst for the men while Shantal Athill takes on Courtney Roselle for the women. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Over the Edge, Nuts and Bolts and Lunar Impact. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers; Puss must help her learn how to control her newfound strength.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Morgana takes a new title — Mother of Monsters — and vows to usher in an age of reckoning. An epic battle begins in King Arthur's court.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Arthur seeks an alliance with the trolls of Dwoza as Gunmar begins building his army. Merlin and Douxie join forces to forge the amulet.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Keith and Krolia discover troubling details about Lotor

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep joins the Scream-Leading team and starts picking up characteristics of her coach, Meep, much to Ugga's chagrin/Meep kicks Snoot out of the cave for not being a brave hunter. The Croods reluctantly take Snoot in and try to make him into a hunter to get him out of their home.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk want to be in on the new fad of Slateboarding, but must find something to trade with (eggs). Bud and Crud try to corner the egg market/Gran takes in a group of crabby tabbies, and uses their combined crabbiness to get whatever she wants. Grug and Ugga try to get into Snoot's food-sharing party.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: After meeting her riding idols, Pru vows to practice until she's perfect — even if it means missing out on a bonfire her best friends are planning.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Abigail puts herself at risk to reunite an orphaned otter with his family. But the school veterinarian insists the animal will be safer at the zoo.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty can't stop rolling after Skrap-It steals his master cylinder, so the Trux must quickly figure out a fix before he falls off the edge of a cliff

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bully For You When Casper decides he can't take any more of Thatch's nastiness, he forms a secret squad dedicated to putting an end to bullying. The Ra-minator Using the power of invisibility, Casper offers to help transform Ra from a sports zero to an athletic hero.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Weekend at Bunny's Alder and Dash sound the alarm after a terrifying creature threatens Scare School. Grimly Day It's Grimly Day?the grimmest day of the year!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and Ping Pong find a broken bird's nest, containing two eggs, which the Fox Twins have accidentally knocked out of a tree. The Mummy bird is frantic and the friends are determined to save the eggs.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Bill and Raggety meet Astra, a star child who has fallen to earth, but she need their help to return to the starry sky as she's used up too much of her ‘twinkle'

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better – now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it’s time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! Hotel guests Gabby and Pandy check in with the Hotel Manager DJ Catnip then go to Mercat’s Spa and even order room service from Pillow Cat! For our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Undercover Chef - Korea
programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China's perspective, policies and stories.

programme.title: Full Frame
programme.desc: Full Frame enriches the lives of viewers through animated discussion of film, arts and culture, and social trends etc impacting a diverse global audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Zoom in
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)
programme.desc: Locals in Ohio compete for $5,000 and a chance to take on Street Outlaw Doc for another $5,000. And a small-tyre racer is racing for a cause.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Otto Karasch travels to the Wild West for an ambitious challenge: to participate in a cattle drive as a cowboy, undergoing a tough training session.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Does Otto have what it takes to be a cowboy? In California, he reveals what he's learned and leads nearly 200 cattle across the prairie.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Otto heads to the Congo River using a dugout canoe. As civil war rages in the region, an encounter with armed militia could have fatal consequences.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In the Everglades of Florida, Otto and Pascal Feyh hunt an invasive species of snake, the Burmese python, which can grow up to five metres long.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Phil and Heather board the USS Hornet, a haunted WWII aircraft carrier, and explore its eerie decks guarded by sailors beyond the grave.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water (Specials) (S8)
programme.desc: For more than a decade, Dustin Hurt and his crew of extreme white-water miners have pushed themselves right up to the threshold of death's door.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: When a man is killed on camera outside an Atlanta hotel, police use license plate readers to solve the mystery. Texas police use a tiny detail to track robbers down.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Tony blows up at Mike to get the trommel running. Two of Rick’s crew face off while trying to dig out Valhalla. Kevin leans on Buzz to get more gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: In the definitive guide, miners reveal exactly where to find gold all over the world, from creeks to glaciers and even on beaches.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out (S2)
programme.desc: Ed goes head to head with ex-PSYOPS marine and real-life ninja, Hakim Isler, in the notorious Zoige Marshes of Sichuan Province.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: At a hoard Matt's been circling for years, a genius inventor's pinball and jukebox collection could bring big sales -- but only if it's intact.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Phil and Heather board the USS Hornet, a haunted WWII aircraft carrier, and explore its eerie decks guarded by sailors beyond the grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective (S4)
programme.desc: After multiple homicides occur along Virginia's Colonial Parkway, Authorities task Det. Danny Plott with finding a serial killer.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: When a man is killed on camera outside an Atlanta hotel, police use license plate readers to solve the mystery. Texas police use a tiny detail to track robbers down.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: The crew investigates a family-owned pizzeria in Magna, UT, that's been cursed by an evil witch.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S2)
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S2)
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Dave and Cody seek to escape the dangerous and deadly hippo-infested marshland using only a dying GPS and waterlogged binoculars.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: KevDogg and Dave take the rig to the Triple Crown of Rodding show in Nashville. They check out the local builds and get into some shenanigans.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: At El Prat Airport, passengers become defensive when they are stopped by officers. In Algeciras, a lorry is concealing something in its base.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: At Barajas Airport, two passengers attempt to smuggle illegal substances. At El Prat Airport, a nervous passenger gets caught with contraband.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S2)
programme.desc: Dave and Cody's only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: A vengeful spirit has taken the form of the Tooth Fairy to exact vengeance on the town that lynched her 150 years earlier. Her only opposition is the only child, now grown up, who has survived her before.

programme.title: Monster Jam S3 - EP 12
programme.desc: Returning season. Professional monster truck drivers compete against each other in races and freestyle competitions around the world to win the top prize.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Parker decides to take down a local factory kingpin using child labor. While the villain spins his own version of how he was wrongfully destroyed, the team tries to unravel the con Parker’s running as a solo side job or is she? The team must play catch up as they find themselves drafted into her machinations.

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 5
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 12
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Planet Action S4 - EP 7
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 88
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 89
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S6 - EP 9
programme.desc: Nature is a tempestuous beast, capable of destruction on a level so devastating and claimed the lives of millions. In recent years, these extreme weather events have become more and more commonplace.

programme.title: Lingo USA S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 19
programme.desc: England are being reshaped by Thomas Tuchel, Amad Diallo is a rising star for the Ivory Coast, and the U20 World Cup bodes well for Morocco's future.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo S3 - EP 11
programme.desc: Mat Yoyo - The New Generation is an educational program in its third season and continues to provide children with wholesome family edu-tainment and fun.

programme.title: Hoppy & Friends - EP 10
programme.desc: Hoppy and Friends is a Pre-school series featuring Hoppy, the Rabbit, Leo the Lion and Panny the Panda. Every episode, they embark on an adventure through stories. Join them on a fantastic journey and explore the wonderful world around them through song, dance.

programme.title: The Big Q S4 - EP 7
programme.desc: The Big Q S4

programme.title: Hobby TV S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: From playing with skateboards to collecting stamps from building models to drawing comics, hosts Randall and Gus show kids the ins n outs of hobbies – the wacky way!

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 3 - EP 17
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 3 - EP 18
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories - EP 2

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 35
programme.desc: Making salad is all about timing! Dr Slime is cutting up some fruits for his fruit salad, but before he knows it, some of his fruits have browned? What can he do to prevent browning and keep his fruits fresh for the salad?

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 36
programme.desc: It is Mother’s Day! Dr Slime wants to make some unique gifts for his mother. How can he make his own special bouquet, a perfume, and a snow globe with regular household items?

programme.title: The Woohoos! - EP 19
programme.desc: Join Wynona the puffin, Iggy the wolfhound, Scotty the highland bull and Ellie the hare as they wonder at the natural world all around them on Wise Island. Each episode brings an exciting "Ooo" moment, a new discovery that needs explaining, and when they find the answer what do they say? "WOOHOO!"

Farhana M Noor and Dawn Prima Ria share their ups and downs as they take on a new role as mothers in real life. Plus, performers from the Singapore Jump Rope Academy show some nifty footwork.

programme.title: Nona - EP 10
programme.desc: The show is hosted by Amyra Rosli. The show covers various aspects of modern women's lives, including entrepreneurship, fashion, beauty secrets, lifestyle, and inspiring stories of successful individuals. Pesona Guest - Mimi Fly

programme.title: Restu - EP 11
programme.desc: A widowed, eligible father is being pursued by three women to be his new wife but what they don't realise is that to win his heart, they will have to convince his daughter first.

programme.title: Anggun Mikayla - EP 1
programme.desc: Mikayla, a makeup artist met Idriz, a food delivery guy in an unexpected incident at a haunted house. She helps him in his audition to become an actor. Idriz becomes mesmerized by her kindness, not knowing that she had been shouldering a painful past.

programme.title: Sumandak Takes Borneo - EP 10
programme.desc: A fun travelogue featuring Tracie, Dina, and Auni exploring Borneo's diverse cultures, natural beauty, food, and traditions.

programme.title: Staycation With Fattah & Siti - EP 10
programme.desc: A travel adventure series where hosts Fattah and Siti explore the natural beauty, cultural heritage, and hidden gems of Sarawak, Malaysia — from lush rainforests and coastal resorts to traditional Iban and Melanau villages — through immersive local experiences and outdoor adventures.

programme.title: Seoul Cinta - EP 13
programme.desc: Though it hurts him, Lukman tells Daniel that Azra only has him in her heart, revealing her true feelings. Daniel decides to let go of his unrealistic expectations of a perfect partner and finally becomes honest about his own feelings.

programme.title: Mentua - EP 4
programme.desc: Azizah schemes to create distance between Emilia and Azim by using Sofea to undermine Emilia at her own wedding reception. Meanwhile, her husband, Husin, is increasingly tempted by Emilia's best friend, Lidya.

programme.title: Tali dan Tangga - EP 4
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating journey through the world of Snakes & Ladders like never before! Participants will enjoy a jazzed-up version of the beloved Snakes and Ladders game, adding excitement and nostalgia to the experience. Trivia questions woven into the game provide an opportunity for learning while playing, making it a fun and enriching experience for all. Players have the chance to win interesting prizes strategically placed on the game board, adding an extra layer of excitement.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 10
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.
